honesty: SIMULATED knee — no concurrent-unit silicon (Aetina offline, issue #52). Only the SHAPE (rising-then-saturating; linear when contention off) is genuine; the 4c/1c ratio 'match' is BY CONSTRUCTION (knee calibrated to the measured mean), NOT validation. NOT a numeric gate.
knee_calibrated_as: knee = eff_BW * mean(card 4c/1c) — the knee is CALIBRATED to the measured ratio, NOT validated against it.
size_dependence_note: a constant knee gives a CONSTANT 4c/1c ratio; the measured mild size-dependence (1.130->1.081) is NOT captured — disclaimed, simulated.
ramulator2_multistream: FUTURE cross-check (only single-stream LPDDR5 eff ships today); issue #52.
